summary: Add `podcast auto` and show-bible helpers for topic-to-script generation with optional produce handoff.
reason: ElevenLabs has no autonomous showrunner endpoint; this hand-authored workflow stores show identity, generates a valid podcast-produce script from a brief, and can hand that script to the existing audio pipeline.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go vet ./...; go test ./...; govulncheck ./...; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/ai/elevenlabs/
